title: Biryani
description: A royal and aromatic mixed rice dish made with Indian spices, basmati rice, and marinated meat or vegetables.
ingredients: Pinch of Saffron soaked in milk
steps: Marinate the meat/veggies with yogurt, biryani masala, and half the fried onions.
Parboil the rice with whole spices until 70% cooked. Drain water.
In a heavy-bottomed pot, layer the marinated mix at the bottom.
Top with the parboiled rice, drizzle saffron milk, and remaining fried onions.
Seal the pot and cook on Dum (very low heat) for 20-30 minutes.
seoDescription: Learn how to make the best Biryani at home. A royal and aromatic mixed rice dish made with Indian spices, basmati rice, and marinated meat or vegetables.

instructions.title: Prep Work
instructions.description: Marinate the meat/veggies with yogurt, biryani masala, and half the fried onions.

instructions.title: Cooking Process
instructions.description: Parboil the rice with whole spices until 70% cooked. Drain water.

instructions.title: Cooking Process
instructions.description: In a heavy-bottomed pot, layer the marinated mix at the bottom.

instructions.title: Cooking Process
instructions.description: Top with the parboiled rice, drizzle saffron milk, and remaining fried onions.

instructions.title: Finishing Touches
instructions.description: Seal the pot and cook on Dum (very low heat) for 20-30 minutes.

cookingTips: For the best Biryani, always use fresh, high-quality ingredients.
Do not rush the cooking process; allow the flavors to meld naturally.
Adjust the spices according to your personal taste preference.

faq.question: Can I make Biryani ahead of time?
faq.answer: Yes, you can prepare the ingredients in advance, but it's best served fresh.

faq.question: How do I store the leftovers?
faq.answer: Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.

faq.question: Can I freeze this dish?
faq.answer: It is generally not recommended to freeze this as it may alter the texture.
